check_records.name: fixture-coverage
check_records.summary: Required starter fixture artifacts are committed for high_current_led_driver. This is coverage evidence only.

author: ZapTrace Core Team
limitations: Starter fixture coverage does not prove LED thermal safety, luminous performance, current rating adequacy, electrical correctness, or manufacturability.
KiCad files in this fixture are hash fixtures for release workflow coverage, not a fabrication-ready board.
